transcripts.summary:
- Coastal Credit Union Employee Engagement Survey 25 configured to match last year's theme for consistency in branding and user experience.
- New ENPS question incorporated into the anonymous survey structure for enhanced feedback collection in 2025.
- Feedback functionality disabled while retaining three open text questions to gather qualitative insights from respondents.
- Survey launch is set for September 22nd at 10:00 AM EST, with a closing date of October 3rd at 5:30 PM EST, allowing an 11-day response window.
- Twice weekly email reminders will initiate on September 24th, following an established engagement pattern to boost participation.
- A flexible reminder system will accommodate additional notifications based on participation rates during the survey.
- Weekly participation digests will be delivered every Tuesday, focusing on department-based insights to enhance reporting.
- Previous year's participation rate of 81.7% set as a benchmark target for this year's engagement metrics.
- All participant data has been successfully loaded onto the platform, totaling 617 individuals after adjustments.

## **Survey Platform Configuration & Deployment**
- **Coastal Credit Union Employee Engagement Survey 25** fully configured with strategic enhancements over previous year's framework (00:00)
  - Anonymous survey structure maintained to encourage honest employee feedback and participation
  - **ENPS (Employee Net Promoter Score) question** integrated as new measurement component for 2025, expanding beyond traditional engagement metrics
  - **3 open text questions** retained from previous year's successful survey structure, providing qualitative insights alongside quantitative data
  - Survey theme consistency preserved from 2024 to maintain brand recognition and user familiarity
  - **617 active participants** loaded onto platform after systematic removal of test accounts, ensuring clean participant database
  - Feedback functionality strategically disabled to streamline survey experience and focus on core engagement measurements

## **Launch Timeline & Coordination Strategy**
- **September 22nd, 10:00 AM EST launch** synchronized with organizational communication strategy (02:34)
  - **October 3rd, 5:30 PM EST closure** providing **11-day response window** for comprehensive employee participation
  - Cross-timezone coordination demonstrated through **1:45 AM vendor-side meeting** to ensure seamless Monday morning launch
  - Pre-launch configuration completed on Saturday to eliminate Monday morning rush and potential technical issues
  - Launch timing aligns with standard business hours to maximize initial survey visibility and employee awareness

## **Strategic Reminder Campaign & Engagement Optimization**
- **Twice-weekly email reminder cadence** implemented following proven engagement methodology (04:48)
  - **September 24th (Wednesday) 11:00 AM** first reminder strategically timed 2 days post-launch
  - **September 26th (Friday)** second reminder maintaining end-of-week visibility
  - **September 29th (Monday)** third reminder following consistent Monday/Wednesday/Friday pattern
  - **Flexible reminder infrastructure** allowing real-time additions based on participation analytics
  - Reminder templates pre-configured for **survey launch**, **standard reminders**, and **final day notifications**
  - Template customization capability enabling targeted messaging for different participant segments

## **Participation Analytics & Performance Monitoring**
- **Weekly participation digest program** launched to drive organizational engagement through data-driven insights (09:03)
  - **Department-based demographic analysis** selected as primary reporting framework for actionable team-level insights
  - **Tuesday delivery schedule** providing mid-week participation data for remainder-of-week engagement initiatives
  - **81.7% participation benchmark** from previous year establishing performance target for 2025 survey (10:50)
  - **Real-time participation tracking** enabling responsive reminder strategy adjustments
  - Department-level insights designed to identify low-participation teams requiring focused internal communication efforts
  - Analytics framework supporting internal HR initiatives to boost survey completion rates across all organizational units


**Yugi**
Publish survey for automatic launch on September 22nd at 10:00 AM EST (07:10)
Send weekly participation digest reports every Tuesday organized by department demographics (10:50)
Add additional reminder notifications if needed based on participation rates during survey period (07:10)

**Megan**
Contact Yugi via text or email to request additional reminders if participation rates require intervention (07:10)
